query:
UPDATE workshops SET title = $2, slug = $3, description = $4, location = $5,
               price_cents = $6, start_date = $7, end_date = $8, max_seats = $9,
               current_enrollments = $10, min_age = $11, category_id = $12, level_id = $13,
               updated_at = $14
               WHERE id = $1
